content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.84%, Pharma (+2.71%), Realty (+2.49%), IT (+2.43%) leading. VIX down 5.78% to 18.57 indicating risk-on. However book is already 60% deployed with multiple positions in power/energy cluster - need to focus on managing existing positions rather than adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.6% but stock recovered today +1.72% off lows. Strong Q4 print (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13%). SL at 76.50 (~3.5% below CMP) gives room. Thesis intact, holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Best performer at +6.7%. Trailing SL mandate: P&L >4%, moving SL up from 1035 (which is below entry 984... wait, 1035 is ABOVE entry actually). Current SL 1035 is already above entry. Move SL up further to 1020 to lock more gains - actually 1035 is tighter than 1020. Keeping SL at 1035 is appropriate. Cancel this MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best performer +6.7%. SL at 1035 already locks in ~5% gain above entry 984. CMP 1052, SL 1035 is ~1.6% below CMP - already tightly trailed. Target 1110 (~5.5% upside) intact. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -0.6%. SL 119 (~4.3% below) appropriate for ETF. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1413.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +0.8%, near 52w high after blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%). Current SL 1418 is ABOVE entry 1412.94 - already at breakeven+. Moving slightly lower to 1413 to give breathing room... actually that's loosening which will be rejected. Keep current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1418 already locks small gain above entry 1412.94. Target 1465 intact. Stock consolidating near 52w high after blockbuster Q4. No SL change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.6% but recovering. Q4 earnings Apr 30 (3 days) is binary risk. SL at 2295 (~1.6% below) provides reasonable downside protection. Hold into results given accumulation signals (delivery +47%, OI rising) and Nestle peer-read positive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 1.2%, fresh 52w high. Current SL already at 406 (above entry 404.50) - locking in small gain. No change needed actually."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 406 already above entry 404.50. Stock at 52w high on capacity COD news + heatwave thesis. Target 425 intact. No-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1770.00,
      "new_target": 1920.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock recovered intraday from lows; CMP 1785 vs entry 1810 (-1.4%). Tightening SL slightly from 1760 to 1770 (~0.8% below CMP) given high volatility +5% range. Actually 1760 is fine given ATR; tightening might trigger on noise. Better to hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Volatile session (range 1704-1824). SL 1760 (~1.4% below CMP) gives room. Power cluster strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1%. Organon deal positive long-term but stock pulled back from intraday high 1766 to 1731. SL 1720 tight. Hold - thesis intact, give it time."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1%. SL 318 (~0.9% below CMP) tight. Q4 May 19 catalyst ahead. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing pending BUY LIMIT @ 23.65 from this morning. CMP 23.79 above limit - won't fill at current levels. Pharma already running. Letting order stand; not stacking duplicate. Note: pharma exposure already via SUNPHARMA holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing pending BUY @ 443. CMP 452.90 well above limit - won't fill. Power cluster already heavy with NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER. Cancelling would be appropriate but holding exposure cap. Power cluster discipline - NOT adding more. Letting stale order sit; if not filled by EOD will reassess."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 612 from earlier. Not stacking duplicate. Letting limit work."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    },

    },

    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "High volatility session, SL appropriately positioned given ATR."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Organon deal thesis intact; let position breathe."
    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL already in place, awaiting Q4 catalyst."

  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "INDUSINDBK, M&MFIN, IDFCFIRSTB, VBL, HINDZINC, SAIL all show momentum but book is full and cluster discipline limits adds. Will reassess tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 60% deployed across 9 positions. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER) already ~25% of capital - DO NOT add TATAPOWER even if pending order fills. FMCG cluster (NESTLE + HUL) ~7%. Multiple Q4 earnings events in next 1-3 weeks (HUL Apr 30, TORNT May 13, NTPC May 15, POWERGRID May 19). Net unrealized +0.24% session. Disposition is HOLD-and-manage, not add. Stale TATAPOWER pending order should be cancelled if it doesn't fill by EOD - flagging for next tick."
}
